title: Heavy Duty Broom Head 40cm (16”) - Extra Stiff PVC Bristles for Driveways, Patios & Garages - Outdoor/Indoor Yard Brush with Handle Bracket - Tough Sweeping Brush for Caravans, Warehouses & Gardens
features: Traditional Wooden Outdoor Broom - Featuring a hard beech stock of brush heads sweeping, this garden brush is perfect to clean leaves and any stubborn dirt in your garden, yard broom, paths or patio
Hard Bristle Broom – The 16 inches/40 cm patio outdoor broom heavy duty is made from stiff PVC red bristles for a firm cleaning action to scrub the stone, concrete, bricks, decking or driveways

Heavy Duty Broom Head Bracket - The brush head fittings are made of metal for tough stiff brush support so that your floor scrubbing brush is ideal for all outdoor tasks. Fits most broom handles, hole size 22 mm diameter (not supplied)

Versatile Use All Around – This outdoor brush can withstand both wet and dry conditions, and can be used for a long time. Both the hard PVC bristles and a sturdy, corrosion resistant broom bracket are also resilient in any weather conditions

Specifications - The wooden broom dimensions: 40 x 9 x 5 cm. Lenght of stiff broom bristles: 7 cm. Braid rows: 5 rows. Material composition: beech wood, PVC. This outside broom is fitted with a metal broom head bracket, hole size 22mm diameter
description: Product Description Heavy Duty Broom Head with Stiff PVC Bristle 40 cm with Fitted Broom Handle Bracket - Sweeping Brush Outdoor Yard Brush Traditional Wooden Outdoor Broom Featuring a Hard Beech Stock of Brush Heads Sweeping - Perfect Broom for Large Outdoor Areas The Garden Brush Outdoor is an Ideal Push Broom to Sweep up Large Areas Such as Driveways, Paths, Terraces, Patios, and Backyards This Broom Outdoor Can Sweep Away Large Debris Like Grass or Leaves But is Also Efficient in Cleaning Small Dirt Such as Wood Chips, Dust and Sands Product specifications Item dimensions: 40 x 9 x 5 cm Item weight: 560 gr Material composition: 100% Beech wood, 100% PVC Bristles length: 7 cm Bristles colour: Red Braid rows: 5 Broom handle specs: Fits typical broom handle (not supplied); hole size 22mm diameter Heavy Duty Broom Head with Stiff Bristles & Metal Broom Head Bracket Wooden Broom Head with Soft Bristles & Metal Broom Head Bracket Garden Broom Head with Long Stiff Bristles Garden Broom Head with Long Stiff Bristles Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 32 4.3 out of 5 stars 20 4.1 out of 5 stars 34 4.1 out of 5 stars 34 Price £11.40 £ 11 . 40 £11.40 £ 11 . 40 — no data £12.40 £ 12 . 40 Bristle type Unflagged Flagged Unflagged Unflagged Bristle material PVC PET PP PP Key features Resistant to water, solvents, acids, oils, fungus, and bacteria.
